name: Invaders Tower Defense Online
short_description: Build your ultimate defense with a combination of powerful towers. Attack your opponent with strong Invaders. This game is sure to offer a unique and immersive experience for all tower defense enthusiasts!
detailed_description:
Invaders Tower Defense Online (ITDO) is an exciting strategy game that combines attack and defense elements. Get ready to build your ultimate defense with a combination of powerful towers and face your opponents with strong invaders. This game offers a unique and immersive experience for all tower defense enthusiasts!

Key Features:

1. Balance between Attack and Defense:

  • Start with 400 credits and 100 lives to defend.

  • Receive an income of 200 credits per round.

  • Invaders that cross the board reduce their lives.

  • Sending raiders costs credits, but also increases your income.

  • Each round lasts 12 seconds.

2. Variety of Invaders and Towers:

  • Fight over 30 different types of attackers. Each attacker has specific abilities and weaknesses.

  • Choose from over 15 types of towers to strategically position. Each tower has its own characteristics and abilities.

3. Maps and Game Modes:

Explore over 10 different maps, each with unique challenges.

Try different game modes:

  • 1v1 Duel Mode: Take on another player in exciting matches.

  • 2v2 Team Mode: Form a team with a friend and fight against another duo.

  • Free-for-All (FFA) mode: All against all! Be the last player standing.

  • Matches against AI: Hone your skills against artificial intelligence.

  • Defense Mode: Survive as long as you can against waves of increasingly stronger invaders.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Russian
